about.title: Aristocracy in Modification
about.p1: Sir Gary established this catalog in 2026 to elevate the standard of interactive experiences. Forgoing modern garishness, we focus on meticulously engineered modifications that enhance gameplay while preserving artistic integrity.
about.p2: Welcome to the highest echelon of gaming society.
faq.title: Inquiries
faq.a1: A: Every modification is thoroughly tested for stability.
faq.a2: A: Sir Gary's inspiration follows its own course. Requests are generally ignored.
support.title: Assistance
support.p1: For severe structural failures, please reach out with detailed logs of the incident.
terms.title: Conditions of Use
terms.p1: By downloading these artifacts, you accept full responsibility for any destabilization of reality or your game client.
